title: Class × mark: the full system
pedagogy: Tone rules (4/4): marks on high and low class — high/mid + mai ek = low; high/mid + mai tho = falling; LOW + mai ek = falling; LOW + mai tho = high. Real-word drills combining class, mark, and liveness. Checkpoint.

exercises.title: The low-class twist
body: On high-class consonants, marks behave like mid: ข่า → low, ข้า → falling.
On LOW-class consonants everything shifts one step: ค่า (mai ek) = FALLING, ค้า (mai tho) = HIGH.
That's why a high/low pair covers all five tones between them: คา mid, ข่า low, ค่า falling, ค้า high, ขา rising.

exercises.promptNote: pa — ป mid class + mai ek; "forest"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Mid class + mai ek = low tone. ป่า means "forest".

exercises.promptNote: kha — ข high class + mai ek; "galangal"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: High class + mai ek = low tone, same as mid class.

exercises.promptNote: kha — ค LOW class + mai ek; "value"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class shifts mai ek one step: FALLING tone. Compare ข่า (low tone).

exercises.promptNote: khao — ข high class + mai tho; "rice"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: High class + mai tho = falling tone. ข้าว means "rice".

exercises.promptNote: ma — ม LOW class + mai tho; "horse"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class + mai tho = HIGH tone. ม้า means "horse" — compare หมา with a rising tone.

exercises.promptNote: mae — ม LOW class + mai ek; "mother"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class + mai ek = falling tone. แม่ means "mother".

exercises.promptNote: nam — น LOW class + mai tho; "water"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class + mai tho = high tone. น้ำ means "water".

exercises.promptNote: kao — ก mid class + mai ek; "old"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Mid class + mai ek = low tone. When a mark is written, the mark decides — liveness no longer matters.

exercises.promptNote: suea — ส high class + mai tho; "shirt"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: High class + mai tho = falling tone. เสื้อ (shirt) vs เสือ (tiger, rising).

exercises.promptNote: thi — ท LOW class + mai ek; "place / at"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class + mai ek = falling tone.

exercises.promptNote: mai — ม LOW class + mai tho; "wood"
exercises.question: Which tone?
exercises.explanation: Low class + mai tho = high tone. ไม้ means "wood".
